title: Amcor: A Quality Business But Not At 16 Times Earnings
text: Amcor has a proven track record and its earnings are quite resilient. That's why AMCR stock is trading at a premium valuation.

title: Buy 4 July S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Out Of 65
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. The 65 Aristocrats screened as of July 5, 2022, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 23.2%-41.21% topped by CAT & SWK.

title: 7 Cheap Blue-Chip Stocks Under $15 to Buy Now
text: Cheap blue-chip stocks have the appeal of low price, stability, and dividends. These particular picks are all under $15.
